query:
-- Categorise the 20,276 contacts into: keep (sales-relevant) vs cull (not sales-relevant)
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN c.title IN ('Finance', 'CRM Contact', 'Invoice via Email', 'Collections Contact', 'IT', 'Administration', 'Logistics', 'Development') THEN 'cull_not_sales_relevant'
    WHEN c.title IN ('Service Operations', 'Service Purchase') THEN 'cull_service_not_buyer'
    WHEN c.title IN ('Sales & Marketing') THEN 'cull_internal_sales'
    WHEN c.title IN ('Purchasing', 'Maintenance', 'Engineering', 'Production', 'Management') THEN 'keep_potential_buyer'
    ELSE 'keep_other'
  END as category,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT c.title ORDER BY c.title SEPARATOR ' | ') as titles
FROM contacts c
INNER JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
INNER JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
WHERE c.enrichmentSource = 'manual'
  AND (c.email IS NULL OR c.email = '')
  AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY count DESC;

SELECT

    WHEN c.title IN ('Finance', 'CRM Contact', 'Invoice via Email', 'Collections Contact', 'IT', 'Administration', 'Logistics', 'Development') THEN 'cull_not_sales_relevant'
    WHEN c.title IN ('Service Operations', 'Service Purchase') THEN 'cull_service_not_buyer'
    WHEN c.title IN ('Sales & Marketing') THEN 'cull_internal_sales'
    WHEN c.title IN ('Purchasing', 'Maintenance', 'Engineering', 'Production', 'Management') THEN 'keep_potential_buyer'
    ELSE 'keep_other'
  END as category,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT c.title ORDER BY c.title SEPARATOR ' | ') as titles
FROM contacts c
INNER JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
INNER JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
WHERE c.enrichmentSource = 'manual'
  AND (c.email IS NULL OR c.email = '')
  AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY count DESC;
